title: Patanjali Ayurved is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Patanjali Ayurved is Hiring: Quality Control Engineer (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Patanjali Ayurved has an exciting opening for a Quality Control Engineer at our Chandigarh office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Patanjali Ayurved:
Patanjali Ayurved is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Maintain accurate production records and prepare daily reports
• Monitor equipment performance and coordinate preventive maintenance
• Ensure environmental compliance and waste management
• Implement lean manufacturing and continuous improvement initiatives
• Manage supplier quality audits and vendor development
• Prepare production cost analysis and efficiency reports
• Coordinate with logistics for dispatching finished goods

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Six Sigma
• Proficiency in AutoCAD
• Proficiency in ISO 9001
• Proficiency in Kaizen
• Proficiency in FMEA
• Proficiency in SolidWorks
• Proficiency in Statistical Process Control
• Proficiency in SAP MM/PP

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Referral bonus program
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Chandigarh, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Patanjali Ayurved!
